fields.label: Voucher Doctype
fields.description: The voucher type this override applies to, e.g. 'VECRM Expense Voucher'. Part of the composite unique key with voucher_name.

fields.label: Voucher Name
fields.description: The voucher this override applies to, e.g. 'VE/EV/00001/26-27'. Part of the composite unique key with voucher_doctype — one override row per voucher (single-row upsert, not an append log).

fields.label: Period Key
fields.description: Half-month key (e.g. '2026-06-H1') derived from the voucher's date at override time. Informational — not part of the unique key.

fields.label: Advance Override (₹)
fields.description: Accounts-set advance for payout. When present, supersedes the submitter's advance_amount for net payable. The presence of this row IS the override; deleting it reverts to the submitter's declared advance.

fields.label: Set By
fields.description: Email/user who last set this override (audit; modified/modified_by also record this).
